subject: Project Management
title: Scaling Scrum for Enterprise
description: A fast breakdown of Scaling Scrum for Enterprise for builders.

hook.text: Scrum works beautifully with one team. What happens when you have fifty?

buildup.text: Multiple teams need coordination: shared backlogs, aligned sprints, and dependency management.

discovery.text: Frameworks like SAFe, LeSS, and Nexus emerged to coordinate multiple Scrum teams.

twist.text: Each scaling framework adds process. The more you scale, the less agile it feels.

climax.text: Scaling Scrum is PM's hardest unsolved problem — simplicity doesn't scale simply.

punchline.text: Scrum's greatest feature — simplicity — is its scaling limit.

quiz.question: What is the core challenge of scaling Scrum?
options: Teams refuse to follow the Scrum Guide
Scrum cannot be used with more than one team
